subcodes.first_line: O thou divinely learned one! I have perused the contents of thy letter and have supplicated unto the Lord of Lords that He may send forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفاضل الربانی قد اطلعت بمضمون الکتاب و ابتهلت الی رب الارباب ان یرسل
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
